find.name: Arely
find.why: You would love to meet Arely, as you both share a passion for spatial design that could spark some inspiring conversations.

find.name: Emily Vargas
find.why: You should meet Emily Vargas because her bold creativity aligns perfectly with your taste and craft, promising a vibrant exchange of ideas.
find.match_belief: Color budgets force honesty. You can't hide behind variety when you get five pigments and one idea.

profile.belief: Constraints aren't obstacles to work around. They're the exact pressure that forces elegance.
profile.working_on: turning a condemned classical theater into an installation by reading its cracks as text

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to find beauty in imperfection, using limitations as a canvas for creativity and deeper understanding.
